# Delivery Patterns

## Repo Delivery

- use when sharing the full Carni-mvp state
- include build verification and key changed areas

## EBAC Delivery

- focus on the educational Node.js scope
- include `app.js`, `package.json`, and `package-lock.json` when requested
- attach concise explanation and review link

## Truthfulness Rule

- document only what exists now
- distinguish roadmap from implemented behavior
